🎉 Create a Board

Honour a lifetime
of dedication.

A collaborative retirement board your whole team signs — heartfelt tributes, career memories, and golden wishes — delivered as a keepsake they'll treasure forever.

Create a Retirement Board

Flat fee · $5 per board · Unlimited signers · Yours forever

🏆 Retirement Tribute
"Three decades of brilliance, leadership, and heart. Thank you for shaping who we are as a team. You've earned every moment of this golden chapter!"
PDA+23
26 teammates signed
1994Joined
2008Director
2024Retired 🎉
One board · One price$5

How it works

Four golden steps to honour a lifetime of dedication

Create Board

Start a golden retirement board and set up the honoured colleague

1Dashboard

Share Memories

Collect stories, milestones and heartfelt messages from the whole team

2Collaborate

Gift & Print

Premium printed memory book + curated retirement gift delivered to their home

3Keepsake

Celebrate

Share a private board link, export the PDF and celebrate the golden chapter

4Share & Reveal

Hover over each card to explore

Retirement Memory Map

Colleagues across the globe honour decades of dedication. Watch heartfelt tributes light up from New York, London, Mumbai, Tokyo, and beyond!

“
P

Priya Sharma

Department Head📍 New Delhi, India
1 hour ago

“ Congratulations on an extraordinary career and a well-deserved retirement. Your wisdom, leadership, and contributions have left a lasting legacy that will continue to inspire us for years to come. ”
